---
title: "Curriculum Vitae"
---

[Download PDF version](cv/cv-full.pdf){.btn .btn-primary}

## Academic Positions

**Assistant Researcher** | Faculty of Medicine, University of Porto (FMUP) / RISE-Health | 2017–Present

- Research in cardiovascular biostatistics, machine learning, and AI in medicine
- Teaching biostatistics at MSc and PhD levels
- Supervision and co-supervision of graduate students

**Assistant Researcher** | University of Aveiro (UA) / QOPNA | 2003–2016

- Multivariate analysis, chemometrics, metabolomics, and proteomics

---

## Research Grants & Funding

Participated in **27 research projects**, including as **PI/Co-PI in 3** funded projects, one European Horizon-funded project, and two clinical trials.

### As Principal Investigator

| Period | Project | Grant Ref. | Funder |
|--------|---------|-----------|--------|
| 2024–2028 | Early Cardiovascular, Metabolic and Histological Changes Identified in Children Born from Pregnant Women with Risk Factors | `UI/BD/154955/2023` | FCT |
| 2022–2025 | CardioNIR: CARDIOvascular Near-InfraRed spectroscopy probing | `PTDC/EMD-EMD/3822/2021` | FCT |
| 2012 | The omics challenge: chemometric methods to extract information from biosystems | `PTDC/QUI-BIQ/119881/2010` | FCT |

### As Researcher / Invited Scientist

| Period | Project | Role | Funder | Status |
|--------|---------|------|--------|--------|
| 2023–2024 | Impacto do sexo na (dis)função endotelial para o tratamento da insuficiência car… | Researcher | FCT | Ongoing |
| 2023–Present | VASCUL-AID – Developing Trustworthy AI-Driven Tools to Predict Vascular Disease … | Research Fellow | Horizon Europe | Ongoing |
| 2023–Present | Pacto da Bioeconomia Azul | Researcher | IAPMEI/COMPETE | Ongoing |
| 2022–Present | EVleage: Are extracellular vesicles the missing link between aging and HFpEF? | Researcher | FCT | Ongoing |
| 2021–Present | Rede de Investigação em Saúde: do Laboratório à Saúde Comunitária (RISE-Health) | Researcher | FCT | Ongoing |
| 2021–2024 | SOGALDI: Spironolactone, dapagliflozin or both for HFpEF (crossover RCT) | Researcher | AstraZeneca | Ongoing |
| 2021–2023 | Cardiovascular R&D Center | Researcher | FCT | Ongoing |
| 2021–2023 | IMAGE – Individualized Gastric Adenocarcinoma Early Diagnosis | Researcher | CCDR-N/FEDER | Ongoing |
| 2020 | Myocardial Injury in COVID-19: A Prospective Clinical and Mechanistic Study | Researcher | FCT | Ongoing |
| 2019–2022 | Prever o risco de complicações do tratamento cirúrgico e definir o prognóstico e… | Researcher | FCT | Ongoing |
| 2018–2021 | SExPeRT – Sequential Pacing for Cardiac Resynchronization Therapy | Researcher | FCT | Concluded |
| 2016–2020 | DocNet: Diabetes & Obesity at the Crossroads between Oncological and Cardiovascu… | Invited Scientist | CCDR-N/FEDER | Concluded |
| 2016–2019 | NEw Targets in DIAstolic Heart Failure: from coMOrbidities to personalized Medic… | Invited Scientist | COMPETE | Concluded |
| 2017–2020 | Exossomas de células estaminais mesenquimatosas para tratamento de feridas cutân… | Researcher | FCT | Concluded |
| 2014–2016 | Degenerescência macular relacionada com a idade – perfil metabolómico | Researcher | FCT | Concluded |
| 2012–2015 | Análise de perfis metabólicos: avaliação de efeitos toxicológicos de nanomateria… | Researcher | FCT | Concluded |
| 2012–2015 | ASTHMA – Gestão futura da asma apoiada por amostragem não invasiva | Researcher | FCT | Concluded |
| 2011–2014 | O papel do intestino no desenvolvimento da esteatose hepática induzida pela frut… | Researcher | FCT | Concluded |
| 2010–2013 | Língua electrónica para análise de alimentos | Researcher | FCT | Concluded |
| 2008–2013 | Chemometrics in Food Chemistry | Researcher | FCT | Concluded |
| 2008–2011 | Metabolic profiling of human lung tumors by NMR | Researcher | FCT | Concluded |
| 2007–Present | NMR-based metabolomic study of health disorders of fetus and mother during pregn… | Researcher | FCT | Concluded |
| 2005–2008 | PYLORI L&EPS: Structural characterization of LPS from Helicobacter pylori | Researcher | FCT | Concluded |
| 2000 | ASTEQ: Artificial Sensing Techniques for Evaluating Quality | Invited Scientist | EU | Concluded |

---

## Selected Publications

See the full [Publications](publications.qmd) page.

---

## Teaching Experience

| Course | Level | Institution | Years |
|--------|-------|-------------|-------|
| Biostatistics for Medical Research | MSc | FMUP | 2020– |
| Machine Learning in Healthcare | PhD | FMUP | 2022– |
| Applied Data Science in Medicine | Postgrad | FMUP | 2021– |

---

## Student Supervision

**PhD Students (completed):** 6 · **PhD Students (ongoing):** 4
**MSc Students (completed):** 24 · **MSc Students (ongoing):** 3

### PhD Supervision

| Period | Role | Thesis Title | Programme | Institution | Status |
|--------|------|-------------|-----------|-------------|--------|
| 2024–Present | Co-supervisor | Exploring the Potential of Radiomics in Adipose Tissue Characterization for Card… | PhD, Cardiovascular Sciences | FMUP | Ongoing |
| 2024–Present | Co-supervisor | Early Cardiometabolic Changes in Umbilical Cord Identified in Children Born from… | PhD, Cardiovascular Sciences | FMUP | Ongoing |
| 2022–Present | Co-supervisor | Targeting microbiome for the management of aortic stenosis (Diana Luísa Ferreira… | PhD, Cardiovascular Sciences | FMUP | Ongoing |
| 2021–Present | Co-supervisor | Machine learning methods applied to predict the quality of life in patients with… | PhD, Health Data Sciences | FMUP | Ongoing |
| 2021–2024 | Co-supervisor | Evolving Preclinical Research in Heart Failure with Preserved Ejection Fraction … | PhD, Cardiovascular & Respiratory Sciences | FMUP | Completed |
| 2010–2014 | Co-supervisor | Pregnancy and newborns disorders followed by urine metabolomics | PhD, Chemistry | UA | Completed |
| 2010–2013 | Co-supervisor | Metabolomics of urine and plasma for pregnancy monitoring and prediction of diso… | PhD | UA | Completed |
| 2009–2011 | Co-supervisor | Metabolomic studies to assess beer quality and stability | PhD, Chemistry | UA | Completed |
| 2005–2009 | Co-supervisor | Contribuições para a melhoria da qualidade nutricional do sorgo | PhD, Biological Sciences | UA | Completed |
| 2005–2009 | Co-supervisor | Développement de nouvelles méthodes chimiométriques d'analyse (spectroscopic foo… | PhD | AgroParisTech, France | Completed |

### MSc Supervision

| Period | Role | Thesis Title | Programme | Institution | Status |
|--------|------|-------------|-----------|-------------|--------|
| 2025–Present | Co-supervisor | Tranexamic acid in aesthetic surgery | MSc | FMUP | Ongoing |
| 2025–Present | Co-supervisor | Técnica de redução mamária de Liacyr Ribeiro modificada: estudo de resultados a … | MSc | FMUP | Ongoing |
| 2024–2025 | Co-supervisor | Predictive Value of Abdominal Fat Distribution in CAD Stratification Using ML in… | MSc, Evidence & Health Decision | FMUP | Completed |
| 2024–2025 | Co-supervisor | Breast Implant Illness: symptoms, management and outcomes – systematic review | MSc, Medicine | FMUP | Completed |
| 2024–2025 | Co-supervisor | Tromboembolismo na Cirurgia Plástica – revisão sistemática | MSc, Medicine | FMUP | Completed |
| 2024–2025 | Co-supervisor | The Impact of Tranexamic Acid in Abdominoplasty | MSc, Medicine | FMUP | Completed |
| 2024–2025 | Co-supervisor | Near-Infrared Spectroscopy as a complementary tool in Peripheral Artery Disease | MSc, Medicine | FMUP | Completed |
| 2024–2025 | Co-supervisor | Pilot Study of combined therapy with tranexamic acid in breast reduction | MSc, Plastic Surgery | FMUP | Completed |
| 2023–2024 | Co-supervisor | Dermal Fillers in Facial Aesthetic Procedures – systematic review of severe comp… | MSc, Medicine | FMUP | Completed |
| 2023–2024 | Co-supervisor | Metabolomics and cardiovascular risk in patients with heart failure: systematic … | MSc, Medicine | FMUP | Completed |
| 2022–2023 | Co-supervisor | Exploring the Relationship Between Chlorella and Spirulina Intake and Biochemica… | MSc, Cardiovascular Pathophysiology | FMUP | Completed |
| 2022–2023 | Supervisor | The association between gestational diabetes and the microbiome: systematic revi… | MSc, Medicine | FMUP | Completed |
| 2022–2023 | Co-supervisor | Clinical Risk Assessment of ACL Injury in Athletes using Biomechanical Factors | MSc, Medicine | FMUP | Completed |
| 2022–2023 | Co-supervisor | The microbiome role in cardiovascular diseases – systematic review | MSc, Medicine | FMUP | Completed |
| 2022–2023 | Co-supervisor | Postbariatric abdominoplasty: Scarpa fascia preservation versus classical techni… | MSc, Medicine | FMUP | Completed |
| 2022–Present | Co-supervisor | Toward an End-to-End Platform for Digital Health Care: a Smart Sensor | MSc | UCP-Porto | Ongoing |
| 2020–2021 | Supervisor | Lipidomics analysis in cerebrovascular disease and peripheral arterial disease: … | MSc, Biomedical Engineering | UCP/FMUP | Completed |
| 2019–2020 | Supervisor | Perfil da Expressão Proteica na Doença Arterial Coronária e Fatores de Risco ass… | MSc, Cardiovascular Pathophysiology | FMUP | Completed |
| 2018–2019 | Supervisor | Embryo selection through time-lapse image analysis: a Deep Learning approach | MSc, Molecular and Cellular Biology | UA | Completed |
| 2016–2017 | Co-supervisor | Impacto Metabólico da Expressão dos Oncogenes KRAS e MYC em Murganhos com Pancre… | MSc, Biochemistry | UA | Completed |
| 2013–2014 | Co-supervisor | Detecção e Identificação de Bactérias por Espectrometria de Massa | MSc, Biochemistry | UA | Completed |
| 2013–2014 | Co-supervisor | Lipidómica do plasma materno para diagnóstico de diabetes gestacional e trissomi… | MSc, Clinical Biochemistry | UA | Completed |
| 2010 | Co-supervisor | Estudo de um TTI fotocrómico para aplicação em alimentos refrigerados | MSc, Food Biochemistry & Chemistry | UA | Completed |
| 2010 | Co-supervisor | Análise dos componentes do Azeite utilizando Métodos Quimiométricos | MSc, Food Biotechnology | UA | Completed |
| 2007–2008 | Co-supervisor | Potencialidades da espectroscopia FTIR na caracterização de aguardentes vínicas | MSc, Food Biochemistry & Chemistry | UA | Completed |
| 2006–2007 | Co-supervisor | Desenvolvimento de metodologia instrumental rápida para a análise de alimentos | MSc, Food Quality & Chemistry | UA | Completed |
| 2005–2006 | Co-supervisor | Métodos espectroscópicos para o estudo da cerveja | MSc, Food Quality & Chemistry | UA | Completed |

---

## Professional Service

### Editorial

- Reviewer for: *Statistics in Medicine*, *BMC Medical Research Methodology*, and other journals

---

## Technical Skills

**Statistical Software:** R (advanced), Python, Rust
**Programming:** R package development, Shiny applications
**Reproducibility:** Quarto, R Markdown, Git/GitHub
**Statistical & Machine Learning:** Survival analysis, joint modelling, radiomics, metabolomics, proteomics, causal inference, conformal prediction

---

## Languages

- **Portuguese:** Native
- **English:** Fluent
- **Spanish:** Intermediate

---

*Last updated: February 2026*
